title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) female genital ovary and/or fallopian tube and/or primary peritoneal carcinoma stage group
description: The stage group that describe how far a ovary, fallopian tube and/or peritoneal carcinoma has grown and spread, using AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
